name: Bokeh
description: Out-of-focus city lights swimming in the dark — discs drift, swell and refocus softly with every redraw.

code.style: --light: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --d: @rand(26%, 88%); --lx: @rand(-10%, 60%); --ly: @rand(-10%, 60%); --lo: @rand(0.25, 0.9); --bl: @rand(1px, 6px); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--d); left: var(--lx); top: var(--ly); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--light); opacity: var(--lo); filter: blur(var(--bl)); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
